title: Terra Astra
content:
Terra Astra, also known as Nova Sol II, is the second planet in the Nova Sol system. Located within the Hydian Sector, Terra Astra supported various complex ecosystems. It was first discovered by Humanity, and subsequently settled in 2293 CE. Discovered in the wake of the devastating United Systems civil war, Terra Astra was chosen to be the new home for Human-kind due to it's large size and climatic similarities to [[Earth]].


Terra Astra is orbited by four major satellites and a natural ring system. The largest and closest of its moons, the barren class-B New Luna, is the most densely populated. The second largest, Tres Magna, is geologically hyperactive, and has little human presence aside from a few scientific and mining outposts. Lastly the two smaller class-B moons, Geb and Nut, have small populations. Geb - the furthest from the planet - is orbited by the Terra Astra Spacedock, one of the largest shipyards and orbital facilities in the sector.

Astronomical Information

Terra Astra orbits its star, Nova Sol, at a distance of roughly 160 million kilometers (~1.069 AU). It is the largest of Nova Sol's three terrestrial planets, and the only one able to support complex life.
